failure: Generated v1 passed parser-level slide/text checks but PowerPoint could not read it.
cause: Deleting existing slides with python-pptx and saving produced duplicate slide XML entries in the pptx package.
lesson: Never accept structure-only checks for PowerPoint. Open the output in desktop PowerPoint before handover. Prefer editing existing template slides or generating a fresh version without delete-and-save package churn.

failure: Quote slide v3 rendered with long quote text overflowing horizontally off the slide.
cause: The chosen template layout did not wrap the long quote safely in the rendered PowerPoint view.
lesson: For quote slides, manually insert line breaks and set explicit text-box widths and font size. Screenshot-check long quotes.

failure: Real Risk slide v4 placed body text over the bright blue bottom wave, reducing contrast.
cause: Template background safe regions were not considered during text placement.
lesson: Visual QA must include background contrast. Move important text away from bright or busy decorative regions.

failure: Attempting to overwrite v2 failed while the deck was open in PowerPoint.
cause: PowerPoint held a file lock on the output deck.
lesson: Use monotonic versions for iterative PowerPoint work and do not overwrite files currently open in Office.
